ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tourney_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tourney_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "surface" TEXT /* Surface of the tournament (e.g., clay, hard, grass) */,
  "draw_size" INTEGER /* Draw size of the tournament */,
  "tourney_level" TEXT /* Level of the tournament (e.g., Grand Slam, ATP, WTA) */,
  "tourney_date" TEXT /* Date of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the tournament */,
  "prize_money" REAL /* Total prize money of the tournament */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tourney_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "player_hand" TEXT /* Hand of the player (e.g., R, L) */,
  "player_ht" INTEGER /* Height of the player in cm */,
  "player_ioc" TEXT /* International organization of the player (e.g., ATP, WTA) */,
  "player_age" REAL /* Age of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "turned_pro" INTEGER /* Year the player turned professional */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player's coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "tourney_id" TEXT /* Reference to the tournament of the match */,
  "match_num" INTEGER /* Match number */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winner */,
  "loser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loser */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the match */,
  "best_of" INTEGER /* Best of (e.g., 3, 5) */,
  "round" TEXT /* Round of the match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "court_type" TEXT /* Type of court (indoor/outdoor) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_loser_id FOREIGN KEY ("loser_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_tourney_id FOREIGN KEY ("tourney_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tourney_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match statistic */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match of the statistic */,
  "minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the match in minutes */,
  "w_ace" INTEGER /* Aces won by the winner */,
  "w_df" INTEGER /* Double faults won by the winner */,
  "w_svpt" INTEGER /* Service points won by the winner */,
  "w_1stIn" INTEGER /* First serves in won by the winner */,
  "w_1stWon" INTEGER /* First serves won by the winner */,
  "w_2ndWon" INTEGER /* Second serves won by the winner */,
  "w_SvGms" INTEGER /* Service games won by the winner */,
  "w_bpSaved" INTEGER /* Break points saved by the winner */,
  "w_bpFaced" INTEGER /* Break points faced by the winner */,
  "l_ace" INTEGER /* Aces won by the loser */,
  "l_df" INTEGER /* Double faults won by the loser */,
  "l_svpt" INTEGER /* Service points won by the loser */,
  "l_1stIn" INTEGER /* First serves in won by the loser */,
  "l_1stWon" INTEGER /* First serves won by the loser */,
  "l_2ndWon" INTEGER /* Second serves won by the loser */,
  "l_SvGms" INTEGER /* Service games won by the loser */,
  "l_bpSaved" INTEGER /* Break points saved by the loser */,
  "l_bpFaced" INTEGER /* Break points faced by the loser */,
  "total_points_won" INTEGER /* Total points won by each player */,
  "break_points_converted" INTEGER /* Break points converted by each player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players_tournaments" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "tourney_id" TEXT /* ID of the tournament */,
  "seed" INTEGER /* Seed number of the player in the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "tourney_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players_matches" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., winner, loser) */,
  "performance_rating" REAL /* Performance rating of the player in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ranking" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "tourney_id" TEXT /* ID of the tournament */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player */,
  "rank_points" INTEGER /* Rank points of the player */,
  "previous_rank" INTEGER /* Previous rank of the player before the tournament */,
  "rank_change" INTEGER /* Change in rank after the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ranking_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ranking_tourney_id FOREIGN KEY ("tourney_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tourney_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ranks" (
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rank */,
  "rank_name" TEXT /* Name of the rank */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rank */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tourney_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surfaces" (
  "surface_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each surface */,
  "surface_name" TEXT /* Name of the surface */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the surface */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("surface_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
